task_completion.description: Verify the agent accesses the 'Sales' mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sales' mailbox is selected or clearly visible as the active mailbox in the left sidebar of the FreeScout interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiates the creation of a new folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box, modal, or settings page for creating a new custom folder is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Invoices' folder has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder named 'Invoices' is visible in the left sidebar under the custom folders section.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent locates the target conversation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The conversation with the subject 'Invoice #2023-998 for December Consultation' is visible in the email list or opened in the main viewing area.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiates the action to move the conversation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Move to folder' dropdown, modal, or menu is open, showing 'Invoices' as an available destination for the selected conversation.

task_completion.description: Verify the target conversation is successfully moved to the 'Invoices' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Invoices' folder is selected in the sidebar and the conversation 'Invoice #2023-998 for December Consultation' is visible inside it, OR a success toast notification confirms the conversation was moved to 'Invoices'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the FreeScout web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: All actions are performed within a web browser showing the FreeScout UI, without the use of terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual email application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show genuine interaction with the FreeScout application, not a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the UI was not manipulated using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open to alter the DOM to fake the folder creation or email location.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task operates on a FreeScout email system. The target mailbox is exactly named 'Sales'. The custom folder to be created must be named 'Invoices'. The target conversation to be moved has the exact subject 'Invoice #2023-998 for December Consultation'.
